description_long: This is a rectangular desk with a top made of several parallel wooden planks, finished in a rich brown stain that highlights the natural grain of the wood. The desk is supported by a pair of sturdy, black metal legs on each side, forming a simple yet industrial frame. The legs are rectangular in cross-section and are attached directly to the underside of the wooden top, providing stability and a modern aesthetic. There are no drawers, shelves, or additional features, giving the desk a minimalist and utilitarian appearance. The open space beneath the desk allows for comfortable legroom and easy access from either side. The overall construction suggests durability and suitability for both indoor and outdoor urban environments.
description: A minimalist rectangular desk with a brown wooden plank top and black metal legs, featuring an industrial and sturdy design. The desk is open underneath, with no drawers or shelves.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the wooden plank top and both black metal legs.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the desk and the parallel arrangement of the wooden planks.
description_view_2: Rear view, visually similar to the front, showing the wooden top and metal legs from the opposite side.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again emphasizing the length and the plank arrangement of the desk.
attribute_location: urban park seating area or outdoor workspace
attribute_orientation: The long side with the open leg space is intended to face the user, with the wooden plank surface serving as the primary work area; both long sides are functionally identical.
attribute_usage_context: outdoor writing or work desk for public or communal use
